description: A modular handmade lever-action carbine chambered in .30-06 with a 5-round internal magazine.  A marked improvement over the crude single-shot pipe rifle, its simple design allows for field conversion to .223 or .308, and various magazine adapters can be fitted.

A Luty pattern makeshift smoothbore SMG crudely constructed out of various steel parts using some of the more advanced powered hand tools; likely one of the most complex guns that are feasible to make outside of a machine shop, but still very unreliable.  This one is chambered for 9x19mm cartridges by default and accepts STEN compatible magazines.  The modular design allows for field conversion to .40 S&W or .45 ACP.
//: Crafting recipe must make use of angle grinder, bench grinder, set square and vise, which don't yet exist in game.
